programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Hung is a Kung-fu coach on Lautau Island. His son Lung and his fellow schoolmate, Mao, are considered a couple. One time, Hung's fellow Yan goes to Lautau for help. Lung knows Yan is not a good guy, however, Hung orders Lung to accompany with Yan to develop his career in the city. Yan discovers that Lung is a talented snooker-player and earns much money from gambling. But Lung loses Hung's land to a group of gangsters in game...

programme.title: The Seven Angels
programme.desc: In an unprecedented and sensational move, the police force dismisses seven policewomen simultaneously. They are The Flirt, Diety, Gold-digger, Sherry Holmes, Sixfooter Plus, Plump and Sgt. Crab-pincers. In fact, they are all assigned to a case to catch a sex fiend who has already murdered four night club hostesses. The seven girls work at the biggest night club Crime City Club after training. A promotional gimmick launches: prize for the team of hostesses with the most votes from customers. QE's team jumps to the lead and has a good laugh at the former policewomen. Crab-pincers is angered. Putting aside their assignment, she and her girls go to war to win customers and votes. At the same time, a sex magazine photographer Big John, who happens to be QE's brother, invites The Flirt to a photo session...

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Hung is a Kung-fu coach on Lautau Island. His son Lung and his fellow schoolmate, Mao, are considered a couple. One time, Hung's fellow Yan goes to Lautau for help. Yan discovers that Lung is a talented snooker-player and earns much money from gambling. But Lung loses Hung's land to a group of gangsters in game...

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World II
programme.desc: After he lost his chance of winning easy money in the original film, Bill became an editor for a newspaper and was sent to Canada for a story. What he thought was a chance to re-launch his career turned out to be a reason to get him fired. Just when the family has settled back down in Hong Kong, Bill's wife realized she has won the lottery in Canada...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Chan Hing Kai
programme.desc: Since the 1980's, Chan Hing Kai has created numerous love comedies, yet he opened up that he was “forced” to write them at that time. Later on, he wrote and co-directed “La Brassiere”, a film which entertains without being obscene. He reveals that one of the leading actor, Lau Ching Wan, complained to him afterwards... In this episode, Hing Kai is invited to share the untold stories from his writing career and talk about the changing ecology of screenwriting in the film industry.

E328
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E323
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Can Ghana's Black Stars Deliver At The World Cup?
programme.desc: Ghana's national team has shown worrying signs in recent international friendlies, with many pointing to inconsistent and chaotic preparations. Are Ghana's Black Stars ready to rise, or heading into another storm?

programme.title: Modern African Lifestyle
programme.desc: This time, Afrimaxx host Suecey welcomes you from the Zambian Art and Design Show in Lusaka. Plus: un update for Senegalese boubou, some quirky accommodations in Clarens, South Africa and Nigerian bronze sculptures.

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: Wolf Hiding
programme.desc: Amid the transfer of power at the Hongtai Group, which wields influence in both the lawful and unlawful worlds, a mysterious assassin named Chen An suddenly enters this vortex of confusion and throws the Hongtai Group into chaos. Mai Longwen from the police and Ma Wenkang from the gangs both have their eyes on him... Various forces are waiting for the opportunity to strike. Who is the mastermind behind the scenes? A fierce battle is about to break out.

programme.title: The Tunnel to Summer, the Exit of Goodbyes
programme.desc: The Urashima Tunnel grants a wish to those who enter... with a price. Kaoru Tono appears elusive but has a heavy heart rooted in a traumatic accident in the past. Anzu Hanashiro seems stronghearted but suffers from the gap between her ideal self and reality. The two team up as allies to investigate the mysterious tunnel in order to get what they want. It is an unforgettable, nostalgic story that sweeps past a summer in the countryside.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: Hideyoshi appears to have secured Harima-only for Hanbei's fears to come true. The local lords who had once submitted now revolt, joined by the Mori and Ukita forces. As Hanbei's condition worsens, Hideyoshi is forced to retreat, abandoning his allies. Stricken with guilt, later that night he falls and hits his head, losing his memory. Koichiro does everything he can to help him recover.

programme.title: Curious World Traveler 'Havana, Cuba'
programme.desc: For those who once loved to travel but hesitate amid a weak yen, daily concerns, and an uncertain world, this program offers a virtual escape. Experience a luxury three-day journey abroad-without leaving home. This time, the destination is Havana, Cuba, where actor Ihara Rikka explores its colorful streets and vibrant culture over three days. Local experts introduce the best food, music, shopping, and hidden gems.

programme.title: E114
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange, human-like figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts.

programme.title: E16 - The Mysterious Havana Syndrome
programme.desc: In 2016, an illness strikes dozens of government officials in Cuba. Over the next few years, hundreds more are afflicted. But investigations raise more questions than answers about this bizarre epidemic.

programme.desc: Japan escalates its war in China, drawing increasing US sanctions. Driven by resource shortages and military ideology, Japan attacks Pearl Harbor in a move that will reshape the course of World War II.

programme.desc: From doomed voyages across continents and oceans to covert CIA operations, these missions show that no matter how much preparation and planning are done, things can still turn deadly.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: It's My Life
programme.desc: Abhishek is a young man from a wealthy family whose life has always been controlled by his overbearing father. However, he soon decides to stand up to him after falling in love with a woman.

programme.title: Isi Ka Naam Zindagi
programme.desc: A plot of land is donated to an old man by a kind-hearted landlord who then passes away. The landlord's lecherous and alcoholic son falls into bad company and wants to acquire this land at any cost.

programme.title: Jhootha Kahin Ka
programme.desc: Karan and Varun go to Mauritius to study but decide to stay back as they enjoy their new lifestyle. However, things take an unusual turn when their parents come to stay with them.

programme.title: Baahubali
programme.desc: In the kingdom of Mahishmati, Shivudu falls in love with a fair maiden. While trying to woo her, he learns about the conflict-ridden past of his family and his true legacy.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: In Goa, Sameer falls for Rani, but his roommate Sunny, also smitten, sabotages Sameer's chances, sparking a heated rivalry for Rani's heart, testing friendship and love. Release Year: 2004 Director: David Dhawan Awards: Best Art Direction: Sharmishta Roy Screen Weekly Awards; Best Performance in a Comic Role: Akshay Kumar, Best Background Score, Best Costume Design Awards of the International Indian Film Academy

programme.title: Ek Tha Tiger
programme.desc: Agent Tiger is sent to Dublin to observe a scientist. There he falls in love with the latter's caretaker, who is an ISI agent. Release Year: 2012 Director: Kabir Khan Awards: People's Choice Awards- Favorite Movie, Favourite Movie Actor- Salman Khan, Favourite Action Movie Star- Salman

programme.title: Dil Bole Hadippa
programme.desc: A Punjabi girl wishes to enter the men's cricket team to play in the Cricket World Cup. She disguises herself as a guy. Release Year: 2009 Director: Anurag Singh, Jaya B.

programme.title: Saptagiri Express
programme.desc: Saptagiri, a happy-go-lucky actor, is forced to do his late father's job after his demise. However, he soon learns that his father was actually murdered and embarks on a quest for vengeance.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Avec les équipes de France 24 et les grands reporters aux quatre coins du monde, une découverte des reportages long format sur des sujets d'actualité internationale.

programme.title: Actuelles
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E35 - Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E37 - The Adventure
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Sierra Nevada in California, searching for a mother grizzly bear and her cubs.

programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: E3 - A Little Pig In The City
programme.desc: Petanque has many enthusiasts in Switzerland. In Geneva, the bowling grounds are historic, such as the one in Les Cropettes, where people from all walks of life gather for the love of the game.

programme.title: E9 - A Stroll Along The Seine/Designer Alyssa Jos
programme.desc: Embarking on ''Les Maquereaux'' barge on the Seine means rediscovering Paris in a whole new way. All you need to know about Mary Jane shoes. Under the fingers of plant designer Alyssa Jos, dead leaves are transformed into works of art. Butter yellow is the colour of spring-summer 2025.

programme.title: E22 - Jean Lurcat/Alix Waline/Jacquemus/Alain Ellouz
programme.desc: In Angers, in a 12th-century building, discover tapestries by Jean Lurcat alongside ancient textile works. The world of designer Alix Waline unfolds on both a small and large scale. programme.title: E1 - Benjamin Vedrines, The Mountaineer Of Every Exploit
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the Ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: E22 - Jean Lurcat/Alix Waline/Jacquemus/Alain Ellouz
programme.desc: In Angers, in a 12th-century building, discover tapestries by Jean Lurcat alongside ancient textile works. The world of designer Alix Waline unfolds on both a small and large scale. At the Chateau de Versailles, Jacquemus pays tribute to his family's farming roots. Alain Ellouz transcends light through stone.

programme.title: E3 - A Little Pig In The City
programme.desc: Petanque has many enthusiasts in Switzerland. In Geneva, the bowling grounds are historic, such as the one in Les Cropettes, where people from all walks of life gather for the love of the game.

programme.title: E9 - A Stroll Along The Seine/Designer Alyssa Jos
programme.desc: Embarking on ''Les Maquereaux'' barge on the Seine means rediscovering Paris in a whole new way. All you need to know about Mary Jane shoes. Under the fingers of plant designer Alyssa Jos, dead leaves are transformed into works of art. Butter yellow is the colour of spring-summer 2025.

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

E103 - Bummer School
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: E207 - Fami-Lay-Lay Reunion
programme.desc: The family is hosting Bryce's relatives for the annual Alexander family reunion. Sadie is finally old enough to help in the kitchen. Lay Lay is convinced that a friend of the family's named Ray Ray is an avatar, just like her.

programme.title: E110 - Hand-Me-Downer / Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: E111 - Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry’s got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: E227 - iThink They Kissed
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: E102 - Get the Hump / Sing For Your Supper
programme.desc: It's Best to the rescue when Bester's phobia of camels threatens to de-rail her chances of being dance champ. // Best and Bester go busking, but will Best cope with competition and what happens when burgers and banjos collide?

programme.title: E116 - In the Sky / Best Buddies
programme.desc: When Diamondo refuses to give the twins a ride in his spaceship they embark on some space exploration of their own. // Best becomes entangled in a series of awkward situations when he pretends to know someone he's never met before.

programme.title: E265 - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: E273 - Potato Puff
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving.

programme.title: E110 - Smile for the Camera
programme.desc: Rosa installs security cameras at the park, and people hate being spied on.

programme.title: E281 - The Salty Sponge / Karen for Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town. // Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: E110 - Smile for the Camera

programme.title: E906 - Rough Patch / The GLOAT
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: E8 - Jerome Ake Beda (Ivory Coast)
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. programme.title: E55 - The Skateboard
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E13 - Water Water Everywhere
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: E8 - Jerome Ake Beda (Ivory Coast)
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. Yet he was born far from the vineyards, in Ivory Coast, where he first trained in hospitality. Now settled in the heart of the Leman vineyards, he makes wine a language blending memory and culture.

E10 - Prank Callers/Karaoke Video/Cruisin/Last Meal/New Year's Kiss
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: E1377 - Our House/Beard Hunter/Elasti-Bot/Negative Feels/New Chum
programme.desc: Trying to get the Doom Patrol's house condemned, The Brain becomes a home inspector.

programme.title: E426 - Boss' Birthday/Boss' Mom Ii/Tall Tales
programme.desc: In order to win his approval, the two Docs plan to catch Lamput to surprise Boss’ on his birthday, but things get complicated with the other docs in the lab plan to do the same thing. A fierce race starts between the two teams!

programme.title: E113 - Foam Party/Bianca's Crazy Day
programme.desc: Jim finds out that the sardines have parties, and it looks like he is somehow not on the list. He tries to not take it personally, but it's hard to be both a captain and a friend…

programme.title: E113 - Foam Party/Bianca's Crazy Day
programme.desc: Jim finds out that the sardines have parties, and it looks like he is somehow not on the list. He tries to not take it personally, but it's hard to be both a captain and a friend…

programme.title: E113 - Foam Party/Bianca's Crazy Day
programme.desc: Jim finds out that the sardines have parties, and it looks like he is somehow not on the list. He tries to not take it personally, but it's hard to be both a captain and a friend…

programme.title: E426 - Boss' Birthday/Boss' Mom Ii/Tall Tales
programme.desc: In order to win his approval, the two Docs plan to catch Lamput to surprise Boss’ on his birthday, but things get complicated with the other docs in the lab plan to do the same thing. A fierce race starts between the two teams!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E6 - Humans vs Animals
programme.desc: Humans have sharp senses, which we use to explore our environment. They give us the information we need to survive. But some animals have taken those senses and, through evolution, turned them into marvels of biological engineering.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E1 - Reef Wrecks of Bonaire
programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E1 - Reef Wrecks of Bonaire
programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Macro Mozambique
programme.desc: The coast of Mozambique is home to giants, like humpbacks and whale sharks, but the tiniest species play just as big of a role in the ecosystem. Meet the scientists who are working against the clock to protect coastal creatures big and small.

programme.title: E4 - Life in the Food Chain
programme.desc: The ocean sprawls across 70 percent of our planet and is home to as many as one million known species of plants and animals. However, it is the smallest of ocean creatures that underpins the world’s largest food web – plankton. These microscopic organisms drift through the ocean’s diverse habitats, triggering feeding cycles in their wake. Without them, life in the ocean would cease to exist.

programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E20 - 跌跌撞撞才懂自己想要什麼
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E5 - 說唱主題日合伙人集體炸街
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E5 - 說唱主題日合伙人集體炸街
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E20 - 跌跌撞撞才懂自己想要什麼
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E5 - 說唱主題日合伙人集體炸街
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: E483
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E389
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E227
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E389
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. programme.title: E507
programme.desc: HONG KONG PERSPECTIVES: Hong Kong Perspectives is a Cantonese-language programme. Through interviewing people from different walks of life and key figures in major events, the programme provides viewers with an in-depth understanding of Hong Kong. Staying close to public sentiment and targeting hot topics of social concern, it dissects Hong Kong's current affairs and future prospects from political, economic, livelihood, and cultural perspectives, examining them with varying degrees of depth and perspective.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E6 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - Highlight 9
programme.desc: In this episode crane operator Nick, is called out to a very unusual job removing two old portable cabins from a recycling yard and replacing with new ones. But with each cabin weighing at least four tonnes and overhead electrical cables to negotiate this is a highly hazardous job. Seasoned recovery op Jim’s must rescue an abandoned Toyota from a live lane on the M1. Recovery op Rory visits a depot in Milton Keynes to recover an 8-ton tractor unit normally used to transport pizza. Meanwhile rescue driver Jon must tow a 44-ton bus the wrong way down a dual carriageway….

After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E9 - Highlight 9
programme.desc: In this episode crane operator Nick, is called out to a very unusual job removing two old portable cabins from a recycling yard and replacing with new ones. But with each cabin weighing at least four tonnes and overhead electrical cables to negotiate this is a highly hazardous job. Seasoned recovery op Jim’s must rescue an abandoned Toyota from a live lane on the M1. Recovery op Rory visits a depot in Milton Keynes to recover an 8-ton tractor unit normally used to transport pizza. Meanwhile rescue driver Jon must tow a 44-ton bus the wrong way down a dual carriageway….
